name: Improve hunk rendering and scroll performance

description: Baseline: add representative render/scroll fps benchmark plus correctness checks for split/stack scrolling and hunk navigation
Memoize diff sections and row rendering so hunk navigation only rerenders the active file and changed rows
Try memoized row bodies so selected-line markers can update without rebuilding split and stack cell content
Inline split and stack cell spans to reduce renderer node count while keeping diff formatting unchanged
Memoize App-level derived lists and totals to avoid recomputing filtered files and hunk cursors on every navigation step
Skip the extra wrapper box for note-free diff rows so steady-state scrolling traverses a smaller tree
Fold the hunk-selection marker into split and stack cell text to remove another per-row box
Inline the split separator inside the right cell so split rows render with one less box per line
Render split and stack lines as single text rows so marker, gutters, separator, and content share one row box
